question: DinoBrain stale MCP runtime accepted-memory contamination live pre-response proof review-gated growth closed loop GitHub push

items.title: Configured hooks are not live preflight proof
items.summary: A configured or probe-verified DinoBrain hook must not be claimed as fully live until a fresh trusted Codex or Claude prompt produces pre-response events before manual MCP calls.

items.title: Task outcome: Read-only audit of Codex-only closed loop source/provenance graph changes focused on src/graph-h
items.summary: Completed read-only audit of source/provenance graph handling across graph-health, lifecycle, observatory, and verify-graph-health. The source resolver now recognizes evidence.source, source.trace_path, source.task_path, source_paths, source_operation_path, and legacy single source fields; live data inspection shows parseable accepted records are no longer source-less, with one remaining missing source path and a per

items.title: Task outcome: Read-only audit focused on behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, corrections, memory-on/off p
items.summary: Completed read-only audit of behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, memory audit, memory-on/off proof, and verify-v2 behavior proof surfaces. Found that current behavior evaluation is retrieval/term scoring rather than answer-quality or correction-behavior proof, verify-v2 uses only a temporary self-referential golden case, and memory-use audit returns ok even when trust evidence is degraded.

items.title: Task outcome: Read-only audit focused on durable source/provenance/source-chunk-claim lineage and graph-health
items.summary: Completed read-only audit of DinoBrain durable source/provenance/source-chunk-claim lineage and graph health. Findings: graph health is correctly degraded but reports all accepted instances as missing source mapping; current source/provenance records exist for RAG guidance, but accepted-memory lineage recognition only checks narrow single-source fields and misses source_paths/source_chunk_path/claim_paths/provenance

items.title: Task outcome: task-20260706-161246-Completion-Reviewer-09-read-
items.summary: Completion Reviewer 09 completed a read-only Observatory/UI/graph review. Conclusion: agree with the proposed direction only if completion requires live, non-stale Observatory evidence: fresh graph health over the real accepted corpus, live graph/status endpoints tied to real wiki/operations indexes, visible memory-use audits, active-task hygiene, explicit blocked/pending/verifier/main states, and graph design that i

items.title: Task outcome: task-20260706-161251-Completion-Reviewer-10-data-
items.summary: Completion Reviewer 10 completed a read-only data architecture/performance review across dinobrain and dinobrain-data. Conclusion: AGREE with the intended index-first, SQLite-sharded, graph-aware, provenance-aware direction, but DISAGREE that the current system is scalability-complete. Current live data has operations.sqlite tracked/present, but no wiki.sqlite, no SQLite manifest, no dense-vectors index, and the pers

items.title: Task outcome: Read-only audit of scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs and whether the new/modified live ver
items.summary: Read-only audit found that scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs is a useful real-vault evidence gate but does not prove real Codex desktop dispatch. The accepted source fields are emitted by the hook itself and can also be produced by installer/diagnostic/manual synthetic wrapper invocations. Additional gaps include missing submitted/completed correlation because submitted events lack task_id, fallback to unrelate

items.title: Task outcome: Completion Reviewer 03 retrieval/LLM wiki lens: independently inspect dinobrain-data and dinobra
items.summary: Completion Reviewer 03 inspected dinobrain and dinobrain-data from the retrieval/LLM Wiki lens. Conclusion: AGREE with the index-first, graph-aware, provenance-aware hybrid retrieval direction, but DISAGREE that the current LLM Wiki is complete. Evidence: live Context Packs report lexical_fallback_v2, the data repo has wiki-index.json but no wiki.sqlite shard, current context eval fails on noise despite full recall,
